user.title: Step 1 of 7 · Room & devices
user.description: Setup walks through **7 short pages** — devices, light thresholds, delays, schedule, seasonal, movement, calibration. Every page is prefilled with sensible defaults, so you can simply submit through and fine-tune later via **Configure**.

data_description.room_name: Names the device and all its entities, e.g. "Bedroom". Optional — if left blank, a name is derived from the cover entity IDs.
data_description.left_cover: The blind this automation controls. Required.
data_description.right_cover: Optional second blind — it follows the left one with a 1-second stagger so both motors never start at once.
data_description.lux_sensor: An illuminance sensor (lux) that drives the automation. An outdoor or window-facing sensor works best.

lux_thresholds.title: Step 2 of 7 · Light thresholds
lux_thresholds.description: When brightness rises past a *close* threshold the blinds move darker; they only move back once it drops below the matching *reopen* threshold. The defaults suit an outdoor sensor — keep them if unsure; every page can be revisited later via **Configure**.

data_description.lux_medium: Brightness at which the blinds start moving to medium shade. For an outdoor sensor this is where bright/hazy sun begins. Default: 12 000 lx.
data_description.lux_medium_reopen: Brightness must fall below this before the blinds reopen from medium shade. Default: 7 000 lx.
data_description.lux_high: Brightness at which the blinds move to full shade — strong direct sun. Default: 35 000 lx.
data_description.lux_high_reopen: Brightness must fall below this before the blinds move back from full shade. Default: 21 000 lx.

dwell.title: Step 3 of 7 · Delay times
dwell.description: Delays protect the chain-drive mechanism from rapid back-and-forth cycling. Darkening reacts faster; reopening waits longer to be sure the bright spell is really over.

data_description.dwell_minutes: Minimum minutes between two darkening moves. Default: 10 min.
data_description.reopen_dwell_minutes: Minimum minutes before the blinds may lighten again. Default: 30 min.
data_description.override_duration_minutes: How long the "Pause automation" switch (or a detected manual move) holds the current position before automation resumes. Default: 60 min.

sun_schedule.title: Step 4 of 7 · Opening schedule
sun_schedule.description: Before the morning opening time (and after sunset) the blinds stay closed regardless of light. With a workday sensor, workdays and free days get separate opening times; you can also open at sunrise instead of a fixed time.

data_description.open_time: Earliest time the blinds may open on workdays. Default: 07:00.
data_description.non_workday_open_time: Earliest opening time when the workday sensor reports a day off. Default: 09:30.
data_description.use_sunrise_open: When on, the morning boundary is sunrise (plus the offset below) instead of the fixed times. Default: off.
data_description.sunrise_offset_minutes: Shifts the sunrise boundary. Negative = earlier, positive = later. Default: 0 min.
data_description.sunset_offset_minutes: Shifts the evening close boundary relative to sunset. Negative = earlier, positive = later. Default: 0 min.

seasonal.title: Step 5 of 7 · Seasonal sensitivity
seasonal.description: The same lux reading means something different in July than in December. Seasonal factors scale the light thresholds for summer (Apr–Sep) and winter (Oct–Mar) — 100 % means no adjustment.

data_description.seasonal_split: Applies the summer/winter factors below to all light thresholds. Default: off.
data_description.summer_lux_factor: Threshold multiplier for April–September. Above 100 % = less eager to close in summer. Default: 115 %.
data_description.winter_lux_factor: Threshold multiplier for October–March. Below 100 % = closes sooner in low winter sun. Default: 85 %.

ramp.title: Step 6 of 7 · Gradual movement
ramp.description: Instead of jumping straight to the target position, the blinds can creep toward it in small steps — quieter and visually smoother.

data_description.ramp_enabled: Move in steps instead of one direct jump. Default: off.
data_description.ramp_interval_minutes: Minimum minutes between steps. Default: 5 min.

calibration.title: Step 7 of 7 · Calibrate blind positions
calibration.description: Chain-driven blinds are special: **both 0 % and 100 % can be fully dark**, and the brightest position differs per blind. Move each blind physically, note the raw position (0–100 %) for each of the four states, and enter them here. You can recalibrate anytime from the Configure menu.

data_description.left_open_pos: Raw position giving maximum light for the left blind. Default: 75 %.
data_description.left_medium_pos: Partial-shade position for the left blind. Default: 50 %.
data_description.left_shade_pos: Sun-blocking position for the left blind. Default: 25 %.
data_description.left_closed_pos: Fully dark position for the left blind. Default: 0 %.
data_description.right_open_pos: Raw position giving maximum light for the right blind. Default: 75 %.
data_description.right_medium_pos: Partial-shade position for the right blind. Default: 50 %.
data_description.right_shade_pos: Sun-blocking position for the right blind. Default: 25 %.
data_description.right_closed_pos: Fully dark position for the right blind. Default: 0 %.

abort.already_configured: This cover combination is already configured.

init.title: Blind settings
init.description: Pick a section to adjust. **Each page saves the moment you submit it** and brings you back here — change as much or as little as you like. *Finish* simply closes this menu; there is nothing extra to confirm.

covers.title: Room & devices
covers.description: Rename the room or swap the covers and light sensor this automation uses. Saved immediately on submit.

data_description.room_name: Names the device and all its entities, e.g. "Bedroom". Optional — if left blank, a name is derived from the cover entity IDs.
data_description.left_cover: The blind this automation controls. Required.
data_description.right_cover: Optional second blind — it follows the left one with a 1-second stagger so both motors never start at once.
data_description.lux_sensor: An illuminance sensor (lux) that drives the automation. An outdoor or window-facing sensor works best.

lux_thresholds.title: Light thresholds
lux_thresholds.description: When brightness rises past a *close* threshold the blinds move darker; they only move back once it drops below the matching *reopen* threshold. Keeping reopen roughly **60 % below** its close threshold prevents flapping on passing clouds.

data_description.lux_medium: Brightness at which the blinds start moving to medium shade. For an outdoor sensor this is where bright/hazy sun begins. Default: 12 000 lx.
data_description.lux_medium_reopen: Brightness must fall below this before the blinds reopen from medium shade. Default: 7 000 lx.
data_description.lux_high: Brightness at which the blinds move to full shade — strong direct sun. Default: 35 000 lx.
data_description.lux_high_reopen: Brightness must fall below this before the blinds move back from full shade. Default: 21 000 lx.

dwell.title: Delay times
dwell.description: Delays protect the chain-drive mechanism from rapid back-and-forth cycling. Darkening reacts faster; reopening waits longer to be sure the bright spell is really over.

data_description.dwell_minutes: Minimum minutes between two darkening moves. Default: 10 min.
data_description.reopen_dwell_minutes: Minimum minutes before the blinds may lighten again. Default: 30 min.
data_description.override_duration_minutes: How long the "Pause automation" switch (or a detected manual move) holds the current position before automation resumes. Default: 60 min.

sun_schedule.title: Opening schedule
sun_schedule.description: Before the morning opening time (and after sunset) the blinds stay closed regardless of light. With a workday sensor, workdays and free days get separate opening times; you can also open at sunrise instead of a fixed time.

data_description.open_time: Earliest time the blinds may open on workdays. Default: 07:00.
data_description.non_workday_open_time: Earliest opening time when the workday sensor reports a day off. Default: 09:30.
data_description.use_sunrise_open: When on, the morning boundary is sunrise (plus the offset below) instead of the fixed times. Default: off.
data_description.sunrise_offset_minutes: Shifts the sunrise boundary. Negative = earlier, positive = later. Default: 0 min.
data_description.sunset_offset_minutes: Shifts the evening close boundary relative to sunset. Negative = earlier, positive = later. Default: 0 min.

seasonal.title: Seasonal sensitivity
seasonal.description: The same lux reading means something different in July than in December. Seasonal factors scale the light thresholds for summer (Apr–Sep) and winter (Oct–Mar) — 100 % means no adjustment.

data_description.seasonal_split: Applies the summer/winter factors below to all light thresholds. Default: off.
data_description.summer_lux_factor: Threshold multiplier for April–September. Above 100 % = less eager to close in summer. Default: 115 %.
data_description.winter_lux_factor: Threshold multiplier for October–March. Below 100 % = closes sooner in low winter sun. Default: 85 %.

ramp.title: Gradual movement
ramp.description: Instead of jumping straight to the target position, the blinds can creep toward it in small steps — quieter and visually smoother.

data_description.ramp_enabled: Move in steps instead of one direct jump. Default: off.
data_description.ramp_interval_minutes: Minimum minutes between steps. Default: 5 min.

calibration.title: Position calibration
calibration.description: The raw position (0–100 %) each blind should move to for the four states. Chain-driven blinds differ per unit — set these by physically testing each blind.

data_description.left_open_pos: Raw position giving maximum light for the left blind. Default: 75 %.
data_description.left_medium_pos: Partial-shade position for the left blind. Default: 50 %.
data_description.left_shade_pos: Sun-blocking position for the left blind. Default: 25 %.
data_description.left_closed_pos: Fully dark position for the left blind. Default: 0 %.
data_description.right_open_pos: Raw position giving maximum light for the right blind. Default: 75 %.
data_description.right_medium_pos: Partial-shade position for the right blind. Default: 50 %.
data_description.right_shade_pos: Sun-blocking position for the right blind. Default: 25 %.
data_description.right_closed_pos: Fully dark position for the right blind. Default: 0 %.

abort.finished: Done! Your changes were saved as you submitted each page.
